coverage_limitation: Sampled scan only (~3.1% of the partition was tested).

interpretation.customer_summary: Bad sectors were found. The drive has physical damage and should be replaced.
interpretation.technician_summary: Profile=fast coverage=3.1% blocks_attempted=61035 blocks_failed=14 blocks_slow=33 verdict=SAMPLE_BAD_SECTORS_FOUND conclusion_strength=sampled
interpretation.what_this_means: 14 blocks returned I/O errors. In a 3.1% sample, this suggests the drive has significant physical damage. Additional bad sectors are likely in untested areas.
interpretation.recommended_action: Clone the drive immediately using ddrescue, then replace the drive.

recommendations: Bad sectors detected — clone the drive with ddrescue before further use.
Do not write to or repair this drive until it has been imaged.
